meta.title: About — Aletheia Resource Center
meta.description: Learn about Aletheia Resource Center's mission, educators, and traditions — a school committed to academic excellence and character formation since 1947.

hero.subtitle: Discover our academic programmes, meet the educators who shape young minds, and hear from the families who have entrusted us with their children's futures.

academicProgrammes.introBody: From primary through pre-university, our Cambridge-aligned programmes develop critical thinkers prepared for a changing world.

programmes.title: Primary Programme
programmes.description: A strong foundation in literacy, numeracy, and critical thinking through an inquiry-based curriculum that nurtures curiosity and confidence in every child.

detail.overview: Our Primary Programme is designed to instil a lifelong love of learning from the earliest years. Grounded in the Cambridge Primary framework, students explore the world through structured inquiry, collaborative projects, and discovery-based activities.

curriculum.subject: English & Literacy
curriculum.desc: Phonics, comprehension, and creative writing with differentiated support.

curriculum.subject: Mathematics
curriculum.desc: Conceptual understanding through Singapore Math and manipulative-based learning.

curriculum.subject: Sciences
curriculum.desc: Hands-on experiments and STEM projects that build scientific curiosity.

curriculum.subject: Humanities
curriculum.desc: Age-appropriate history, geography, and cultural studies.

curriculum.subject: Arts & Music
curriculum.desc: Expressive arts fostering creativity and emotional intelligence.

curriculum.subject: Physical Education
curriculum.desc: Structured sports, movement, and wellness routines.

detail.assessment: Continuous portfolio-based assessment complemented by termly Cambridge-aligned examinations.

programmes.title: Secondary Programme
programmes.description: Rigorous academic preparation aligned with Cambridge IGCSE, developing analytical skills and subject mastery to prepare students for advanced study.

detail.overview: The Secondary Programme prepares students for Cambridge IGCSE examinations while cultivating deep analytical thinking, independent research, and a breadth of academic interests.

curriculum.subject: Core Sciences
curriculum.desc: Biology, Chemistry, and Physics with dedicated laboratory sessions.

curriculum.subject: English Language & Literature
curriculum.desc: Critical textual analysis and academic writing.

curriculum.subject: Humanities
curriculum.desc: History, Geography, and Economics with global case studies.

curriculum.subject: Modern Languages
curriculum.desc: Mandarin, Malay, and French language programmes.

curriculum.subject: Co-Curricular Activities
curriculum.desc: Structured CCA portfolio supporting holistic development.

detail.assessment: Cambridge IGCSE examinations at the end of Year 10/11, supplemented by internal termly assessments and project-based evaluations.
outcomes: Breadth of academic and co-curricular achievements

programmes.title: Pre-University
programmes.description: Advanced pathways including Cambridge A-Levels, preparing students for admission to leading universities with personalised guidance and mentorship.

detail.overview: Our Pre-University Programme is a focused two-year track designed to maximise Cambridge A-Level results and secure admission to top universities worldwide. Students receive individualised mentorship, subject specialisation, and expert university counselling.

curriculum.subject: Sciences Track
curriculum.desc: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology combinations.

curriculum.subject: General Paper
curriculum.desc: Critical thinking, essay writing, and current affairs analysis.

curriculum.subject: University Counselling
curriculum.desc: Dedicated guidance for local and international university applications.

detail.assessment: Cambridge A-Level examinations (AS and A2), with internal mock examinations each semester and a dedicated university application portfolio.
outcomes: University admission to local and overseas institutions

educators.introBody: Our dedicated educators bring expertise, compassion, and a shared commitment to helping every student reach their full potential.

testimonialsTab.introBody: Hear from the families who have entrusted us with their children's education and watched them flourish.
